rationale: The cited paper appears only once as part of a grouped citation to prior channel literature on physical consumer goods (with Dukes et al. 2006) in the conclusion. The citing paper uses it to note that traditional physical-goods channel models are well studied and to contrast that stream with its own media-content setting. There is no specific mechanism, model component, or result from the cited paper that is developed, tested, or directly built upon in the citing paper.
